name: I'm a Celebrity...Get Me Out of Here!
original_name: I'm a Celebrity...Get Me Out of Here!
overview: Twelve celebrities are abandoned in the Australian jungle. In order to earn food, they must perform Bushtucker Trials which challenge them physically and mentally.

trailers.title: I'm A Celebrity... Get Me Out Of Here! Returns Sunday 17th November on ITV1 & ITVX
